Title: Racing Stripes
Writer: David Schmidt, Steven P. Wegner, Kirk DeMicco
Actors: Frankie Muniz, David Spade, Snoop Dogg
Plot: A young zebra is accidentally abandoned by the circus, but is found by a man and his daughter. On their farm, they are joined by an eclectic group of animals who eventually conspire to help the zebra cheat in order to win the Kentucky Open horse race.
